title: Backend Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineering
score_reasoning: Your backend systems expertise and distributed systems background are strong assets for this forward-deployed role; the ~20% travel requirement (Toronto, SF, Seattle) aligns with your EU base within acceptable scope. The role's emphasis on user engagement, product thinking, and cross-team collaboration resonates with your multi-team impact at Velox. However, this is a lateral move for a senior engineer rather than a traditional senior promotion—it trades pure technical leadership depth for breadth in user-facing problem-solving and AI-augmented engineering. Your CV shows no evidence of customer-facing engineering, AI tooling experience, or the 'early-stage startup PM' mindset the role explicitly seeks. While viable as an adjacent opportunity and fully remote-compatible, it doesn't strongly advance your stated goal of deepening technical leadership in high-scale distributed systems.

red_flags: Role emphasizes user-facing engineering and product thinking, not core technical depth leadership
Required ~20-30% travel to US offices; candidate prefers remote from Berlin
No evidence of customer-facing engineering or AI-augmented workflows in candidate profile
Focus on billing/payments product-specific knowledge, not core distributed systems
Agent-augmented model is frontier territory; unclear if this aligns with traditional backend goals
